referral_links_scope_merchant_check.name: referral_links_scope_merchant_check
referral_links_scope_merchant_check.value: ("scope" = 'merchant' AND "merchant_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("scope" = 'cross_merchant' AND "merchant_id" IS NULL)

asset_logs_pending_expirable_idx.name: asset_logs_pending_expirable_idx
asset_logs_pending_expirable_idx.where: "status" = 'pending' AND "expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "campaign_rule_id" IS NOT NULL

interaction_logs_unprocessed_idx.name: interaction_logs_unprocessed_idx
interaction_logs_unprocessed_idx.where: "processed_at" IS NULL AND "cancelled_at" IS NULL AND "identity_group_id" IS NOT NULL
